channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran-linked hackers breach FBI director's personal email, publish excerpts online
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- FBI director’s personal email, photos and documents leaked by Iran-linked hackers

- Iran-linked hackers breach FBI director's personal email, publish photos and documents

- Iran-backed Handala hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's emails

- FBI director personal email hacked by Iran-linked group: US media
- Iran-linked hack hits FBI Chief Kash Patel: Emails and photos leaked in shocking cyberattack
- Iran-linked hackers breach FBI director's personal email
- Pro-Iranian hacker group claims breach of FBI Director Kash Patel’s personal account
- Iran-linked hackers claim breach of FBI director's personal email
- Iran-linked hackers claim breach of FBI director Kash Patel's personal email
- Iran-linked hackers claim breach of FBI chief Kash Patel's emails, publish his resume
- FBI director Kash Patel's email compromised, claims Iran-linked hackers; DOJ says, 'appears authentic'
- Iran-linked hackers breach FBI director’s personal e-mail, publish excerpts online
- Iran-linked hackers claim breach of FBI director's personal email; DOJ official confirms break-in
- Iran-linked hackers claim breach of FBI director's personal email; DOJ official confirms break-in]]>

- Nepali rapper to be sworn in as new prime minister

- Nepal’s New Prime Minister, Former Rapper Balendra Shah, Sworn In
- Nepali Rapper To Be Sworn In As New Prime Minister
- Rapper to Ruler: Balendra Shah Balen becomes Nepal’s youngest PM]]>

item.title: Iran says projectile hit near Bushehr nuclear power plant
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- IAEA warns of radiological risk after strikes near Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant
- Iran notifies of another strike on Bushehr nuke plant area — IAEA
- Russia points to nuclear safety threats from strikes near Bushehr plant in UN
- IAEA warns of radioactive leak risk at Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant]]>
